mapper.insert:
insert into articles
article_categories_id, category_name, title, slug, summary, cover_image, content_markdown, content_html, view_count, like_count, comment_count, word_count, reading_time, is_published, is_top, publish_time, create_time, is_deleted,
#{articleCategoriesId}, #{categoryName}, #{title}, #{slug}, #{summary}, #{coverImage}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{contentHtml}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{wordCount}, #{readingTime}, #{isPublished}, #{isTop}, #{publishTime}, now(), 0,
mapper.update:
update articles
article_categories_id = #{articleCategoriesId}, category_name = #{categoryName}, title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, summary = #{summary}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, content_markdown = #{contentMarkdown}, content_html = #{contentHtml}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, word_count = #{wordCount}, reading_time = #{readingTime}, is_published = #{isPublished}, is_top = #{isTop}, publish_time = #{publishTime},
where articles_id = #{articlesId} and is_deleted = 0

update articles
is_published = #{isPublished}, is_top = #{isTop},
where articles_id = #{articlesId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.delete:
delete from articles where articles_id in
#{articlesId}
mapper.select: select articles_id, article_categories_id, category_name, title, slug, summary, cover_image, content_markdown, content_html, view_count, like_count, comment_count, word_count, reading_time, is_published, is_top, publish_time, publish_year, publish_month, publish_day, publish_date from articles where articles_id = #{articlesId} and is_deleted = 0
select article_categories_id from articles where articles_id = #{articlesId} and is_deleted = 0

select articles_id,category_name from articles where article_categories_id in
#{articleCategoriesId}
